name: Content Update Reminder
description: Reminds user to update innovations every 30 days

action.content:
🤖 **Content Update Reminder**

It's been 30 days since your last innovation update!

Would you like to add new innovations to your Ideas Before Time website?

**Quick Actions:**
- Edit innovations.json to add new entries
- The automation system will handle the rest (sitemap, page generation, deployment)

**Current Status:**
- Total Innovations: 9
- Last Updated: Check innovations.json metadata
